name: MemBind Memory
description: Binding-First Agent memory system with two-stage retrieval (binding score + semantic similarity), conflict detection, lifecycle management, and conversation chunk storage. Drop-in replacement for MemOS with superior memory quality.

membindUrl.description: MemBind HTTP API base URL (default: http://127.0.0.1:8765)

notes: Set agents.defaults.memorySearch.enabled = false to disable OpenClaw's built-in memory
Ensure MemBind server is running: cd ~/projects/membind && python -m uvicorn server:app --port 8765
Restart the gateway: openclaw gateway stop && openclaw gateway start
